name: Reincarnation Festival
summary: An annual civic festival where families honor remembered lives, lost names, and promises carried across generations.
timing: First new moon after the harvest accounting closes.
public_practices: Lighting paired lanterns for present and remembered selves
Offering repaired tools to symbolize continuity
private_practices: Chroniclers interview children who report unusually specific memories
Families compare recurring dreams against archived witness records
notes: Merchants treat the festival as a major trade day, while chroniclers treat it as a surge in testimony.
